title: Peeves Ore Compat
description: Adds deepslate variations to the vanilla ores and several modded ores to the peeves texture pack
body:
Adds deepslate textures for the [Peeves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/peeves) resource pack for vanilla ores and moddded ores.

Created for the Chocolate Flavored modpack (not released yet :3)

Supported mods:
- Ad Astra
- Galosphere
- Oreganized
- Sully's Mod
- Mining Master
- Caverns & Chasms
- Create
